patterns.name: Service Registration with Factory Pattern
patterns.description: Complex service initialization using factory patterns within DI container

patterns.name: Typed Logger Injection
patterns.description: Consistent use of strongly-typed ILogger<T> throughout all services

patterns.name: Modular Hierarchical Configuration
patterns.description: Configuration split into focused, strongly-typed classes with nested properties
patterns.codeExample: public class InventoryConfig { public FilePathConfig FilePaths { get; set; } = new(); }

patterns.name: Comprehensive Validation Service
patterns.description: Multi-level validation with severity levels, scoring, and detailed reporting

patterns.name: Try-Catch with Contextual Logging
patterns.description: Consistent error handling with detailed logging and graceful degradation
patterns.codeExample: catch (Exception ex) { _logger.LogError(ex, "Error uploading file to SharePoint: {FileName}", fileName); }

patterns.name: ID Generation with Duplicate Detection
patterns.description: Sophisticated ID generation with collision detection and duplicate merging

patterns.name: Abstract Repository Pattern
patterns.description: Interface-based repository pattern supporting multiple storage backends

patterns.name: Progressive Enhancement Model
patterns.description: Base models extended with additional metadata through inheritance
patterns.codeExample: public class EnhancedRole : RoleWithID { public string StandardizedTitle { get; set; } }

patterns.name: Consistent Async/Await Implementation
patterns.description: All I/O operations use async/await with proper Task propagation

patterns.name: Template-Based Excel Generation
patterns.description: Excel file generation using validated templates with dynamic data insertion

uniqueApproaches.name: Profile Management System
uniqueApproaches.description: Interactive profile selection and storage for runtime configuration
uniqueApproaches.innovation: Saves user preferences for quick re-use with emoji-based CLI

uniqueApproaches.name: Heat Map Transformation Wave Algorithm
uniqueApproaches.description: Matrix-based decision making for transformation readiness
uniqueApproaches.innovation: Considers complexity, interaction level, and location dependency

uniqueApproaches.name: Multi-Source Common Functions
uniqueApproaches.description: Runtime source selection between Azure Blob and local Excel files
uniqueApproaches.innovation: Abstraction allowing flexible data source switching

bestPractices: Every service has a corresponding interface
